SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. THIS CASE SETTLED AS TO DEFENDANTS XIU FEN MA AND BI YAO YU ONLY. THE PARTIES ENTER INTO A SIGNED AGREEMENT, WHICH WAS FILED. THE TRIAL DATE OF JANUARY 23, 2017 REMAINS ON CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT ZONG TANG MA WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. (501)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jan-20-2017 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-18-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 12
Judge Pro Tem: Brad Kaplan, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Ying Goon Young is present.
Attorney Steven Adair MacDonald for the plaintiff.
Defendants Xiu Fen Ma and Bi Yao Yu are present.
Defendant Zong Tang Ma is NOT present.
Attorney Erin Katayama appearing for defendants, Xiu Fen Ma and Bi Yao Yu, only in limited scope.
Cantonese Court Interpreter Catherine Hong is present.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled as to defendants Xiu Fen Ma and Bi Yao Yu only. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of January 23, 2017 remains on calendar as to defendant Zong Tang Ma who was not present. (501)
